label: The Iron Covenant
description: The Iron Covenant is a compact weapons boutique set into Pale Meridian Enclave’s vault-roofed galleries, its ferrocrete frontage reinforced with blast shutters and a recessed transaction grille. Racks of sanctified steel and sealed munition lockers line the walls in regimented bays, each section marked by stenciled inventory codes suited to rationed siege supply. Lumen strips burn in cold, narrow bands beneath soot-dark arches, while a screened test alcove terminates in layered backstops of plasteel and cracked ceramite. The air remains dry with preservative oils and propellant residue, and every surface is designed for rapid counting, locking, and withdrawal under blackout protocols.
